info.name: ProjectOS API v1 - Full CRUD
info.description: Public Gateway API collection. Import the local environment, fill adminEmail/adminPassword, then run folders in numeric order. Storage upload requires choosing a local file in Postman.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set("memberId", json.data.uuid || json.data.id);
